title: sphaerocardamum fruticulosum
intro: Sphaerocardamum fruticulosum, also known as the thorny cardamom or cardamom weed, is a plant species in the family Cardamomaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as cardamomine and cardanin. The health benefits of Sphaerocardamum fruticulosum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a spice or added to food products.
